body_text:
Hi Mon,

  

Just to give you a quick idea вЂ” we offer a few different styles, including
traditional buffet,

more formal plated or family-style meals,

and also a fun churrasco (buffet option with on-site grilling of meats).

Lots of great choices depending on the vibe youвЂ™re going for!

  

I attached a detailed copy of our Catering Menus and Packages.

  

Sharing with you some weddings we recently catered:

  

[Preview of What We Do!!
рџ¤—](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1foxuisXYaFLwqzbdsRL21xk_XqbWkoX-/view?usp=sharing)

[Wedding with BBQ Service](https://dom-12.wistia.com/medias/2m2bo1nib9)

[Backyard
Wedding](https://drive.google.com/file/d/11nuNuIlac8PUT3EL3_hI170Yd_Ha3PKX/view?usp=sharing)

  

[OUR WEBSITE LINK! CLICK HERE!!](https://comeketocatering.com/#packages)

  

  
  
  
  
\-----  
Regards,

**Andre Raw**  
 _вЂ‹вЂ‹_ Catering Event Coordinator
